name: HabitBuddy
description: A habit-tracking app that helps users build positive routines and break negative ones. It provides a supportive community, customizable habit tracking, and rewards for milestones achieved.
features: Habit tracking with customizable goals, reminders, and rewards
Community forums for support, motivation, and accountability
Statistics and insights on habit progress and streaks
target_audience: Individuals looking to improve their productivity, habits, and overall well-being
